dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION Adult dose: 8 mg taken within 30 minutes of going to bed. ( 2.1 ) Should not be taken with or immediately after a high-fat meal. ( 2.1 ) Total daily dose should not exceed 8 mg. ( 2.1 ) 2.1 Dosage in Adults The recommended dose of ramelteon tablets are 8 mg taken within 30 minutes of going to bed. It is recommended that ramelteon tablets not be taken with or immediately after a high-fat meal. The total ramelteon tablets dose should not exceed 8 mg per day. 2.2 Dosing
